title: UAMoney
description:
Resource pack that adds Ukrainian money in pixel style! 
You can also get them by renaming certain items to certain names. 
An ideal resource pack for a server with economy!
body:
![UAMoney Resourcepack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fArJPc8a/images/734148c1c6c37e5c347fec591207f8239c3d39d6.png)
## **UAMoney Info**
A resource pack that added Ukrainian money in pixel style by renaming it for fun.
Since this is our first project, we hope you like it!
There will also be an active update of the resource pack, so there will always be one for your version!\
Requires Optifine or CITResewn for use!\
![Renaming table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fArJPc8a/images/80b31162b85b7707654418fd47b9f13b83d6512f.png)
